problem id: 2fdaf371
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  00011101 -> 10000111
  01111000 -> 00011110
  00000111 -> 10000001
  10001011 -> 10100010
  11111011 -> 10111110
  01100101 -> 10011001
  01001010 -> 00010010
  00110011 -> 10001100

query: 11010011
predicted answer: 10110100
